info.name: Claude Bot
info.summary: Permission management for a Claude AI assistant in Nextcloud Talk
info.description:
## Claude Bot Permission Manager
Control which users and groups are allowed to interact with a Claude AI bot via Nextcloud Talk.
### Features - **User permissions** — Allow individual users to chat with the Claude bot - **Group permissions** — Allow entire groups at once - **Admin UI** — Manage permissions from Settings → Administration → Claude Bot - **REST API** — The bot queries the API to verify permissions before responding - **Autocomplete** — Search users and groups with Nextcloud's built-in autocomplete
### How it works 1. Install this app on your Nextcloud instance 2. Create a Nextcloud user for your bot (default: `bot-claude`) 3. Set up your Claude bot service to call the permission check API 4. Add allowed users/groups in the admin settings
The bot user can be configured via `occ config:app:set claudebot bot_user --value="your-bot-user"`.
info.author: Chris
